message:
test(cli): add unit tests for untested pure functions

Add tests for 20 pure functions across 4 CLI files:
- colors_test.go: hexToRGB, formatBytes, colorToRGB, colorize, formatCleanupBytes
- util_test.go: parseEditorCommand, HasAnyTag, SanitizeFilename, sessionNames, orderSessionsForSelection
- agent_spec_test.go: TotalCount, ByType, Flatten, ResolveModel, ValidateModelAlias, ParseAgentSpec (extended)
- table_test.go: stripANSI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
